zh.Liedekerke,Brabant,Belgium: 比利時布拉班特利德凱爾克

zh.Gaver,Oost Vlaanderen,Belgium: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫貝爾拉雷
zh.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II是Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke的兒子，於1248年出生在比利時布拉班特利德凱爾克。他於1270年與Sibylle De Lille在比利時安特維爾利勒結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1304年享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II是Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke的儿子，于1248年出生在比利时布拉班特利德凱爾克。他于1270年与Sibylle De Lille在比利时安特維爾利勒结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1304年享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gavre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Köber (see Kober ) or Göber (see Gober ).

variants.name: Kober
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Bernhard, Angelika, Dieter, Ernst, Erwin, Gottlieb, Konrad, Manfred, Reinhold, Sepp, Wolfgang.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a shortened derivative of the personal name Jakob (see Jacob ).

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kober, German Kober ‘basket’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a basket maker or perhaps a nickname for someone who carried a basket on his back.

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II was born in 1248, in Liedekerke, Brabant, Belgium as the son of Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke. He married Sibylle De Lille in 1270, in Lille, Antwerp, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1304, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II est né en 1248, à Liedekerke, Brabant, Belgique, fils de Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke. Il a épousé Sibylle De Lille en 1270, à Lille, Anvers, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1304, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II wurde 1248 in Liedekerke, Brabant, Belgien, als Sohn von Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke geboren. Er hat 1270 in Lille, Antwerpen, Belgien Sibylle De Lille geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 56 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II è nato il nel 1248 nel Liedekerke, Brabante, Belgio come figlio di Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke. Lui sposato Sibylle De Lille nel 1270, nel Lille, Anversa, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1304, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Liedekerke,Brabant,Belgium: ベルギーブラバントリーデケルク
ja.Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバー
ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバー
ja.Lille,Antwerpen,Belgium: ベルギーアントウエルペンリル
ja.Gaver,Oost Vlaanderen,Belgium: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンバーラー
ja.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre IIは1248年にベルギーブラバントリーデケルクでRaas VII de Gavere van Liedekerkeの息子として生まれた。1270年にベルギーアントウエルペンリルでSibylle De Lilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年に56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II(은)는 1248년 벨기에 브라반트 리데커크에서 Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1270년 벨기에 앤트워펜 릴에서 Sibylle De Lille(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II nasceu em 1248, em Liedekerke, Brabante, Bélgica filho de Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke. Ele casou-se com Sibylle De Lille em 1270, em Lille, Antuérpia, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1304, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II родился в 1248 г. в местности лиедекирк, брабант, Бельгия. Его отца звали Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylle De Lille в 1270 г. в местности лилл, антвирпен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1304 г. в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Johann de Gavre II nació en 1248, en Liedekerke, Brabante, Bélgica como hijo de Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke. Se casó con Sibylle De Lille en 1270, en Lille, Amberes, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1304, a la edad de 56 años.
